summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of RESOURCES-ANALYZER PRO. Backend: 14/14 pytest cases passing including LLM extraction, juridical analysis (GPT-4o), diagnostic generation, PDF generation (rejd/parlementaire/juridique presets). Frontend: All key flows verified — landing, register, login (smoke@example.com), dashboard, project detail with 6 tabs, KPI summary (12 metrics with color-coded values), 24 Recharts viz elements rendered (Radar, Donut, etc.), Reports panel (7 presets), Diagnostics, Simulator (7 sliders + reactive results), Normative (6 families + jurisprudence = 7 tabs), Glossary (51 entries), theme toggle (dark↔light, persisted in localStorage as 'rap_theme'), legal disclaimer 'DOCUMENT PÉDAGOGIQUE' present on dashboard and project pages. PDF download of parlementaire preset succeeded (8.7 KB valid). 0 console errors during full UI walk-through.

issues: Project cards not wrapped in <a href>; only a button 'Ouvrir' triggers navigation. Works fine with mouse but reduces SEO/keyboard accessibility. Minor — consider wrapping the whole card in <Link>.
Shows 'Bientôt disponible' placeholder with disabled download. Acceptable per spec, just note.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py exposes a single 425-line file — borderline acceptable now but consider splitting routes into routers (auth/projects/documents/analyses/reports) before the file grows further.
extract endpoint stores '_raw_text_full' (up to 200KB) inside the documents collection alongside the public Document record; document list query correctly excludes it via projection. OK.
All MongoDB queries correctly use {'_id': 0} projection — no ObjectId leak observed in any tested response.

GPT-4o extraction returned all required fields (document_type, country, company, sector, regime_fiscal, parametres_environnementaux, parametres_sociaux). Caching works (second call returns cached:true).
Pure analyses persist with delete_many+insert pattern — non-transactional but acceptable for a single-user write context.
auth_token missing -> /api/auth/me returns 403 (FastAPI default for HTTPBearer auto_error=true). Consider 401 for spec consistency. Minor.
test_credentials: smoke@example.com / smoke123 (pre-seeded with project Convention Tasiast id f6df361a-0371-4797-ad46-d05bdfd614be containing extracted data + all analyses). Tests also create ad-hoc TEST_*@example.com users.
seed_data_creation: test_backend.py creates TEST_-prefixed users + projects per run; full pipeline test deletes its own project at the end. Smoke project untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All cycles 1-7 are functional. /api auth/projects/documents/analyses/diagnostics/freequery/simulator/normative/reports endpoints all return expected data. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY GPT-4o calls are real and succeed end-to-end. PDF generation via reportlab returns valid %PDF- bytes for rejd/parlementaire/juridique presets. UI uses data-testid extensively. Theme persisted in localStorage key 'rap_theme'. Project list cards use button 'Ouvrir' instead of <a> tags — selector should be 'button:has-text("Ouvrir")' or click-by-text on project name. To reach project detail directly, navigate to /projects/<id>. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py and run in <40s.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs blocking the requested features.
